movies.title: Captain America: Brave New World
movies.description: Sam Wilson, the new Captain America, finds himself in the middle of an international incident and must discover the motive behind a nefarious global plot.

movies.title: Snow White
movies.description: A live-action reimagining of the classic fairy tale, following Snow White as she escapes the Evil Queen and discovers her own inner strength.

movies.title: Thunderbolts*
movies.description: A group of antiheroes and morally ambiguous characters are recruited by the government for dangerous missions, only to discover they're all pawns in a larger scheme.

movies.title: Lilo & Stitch
movies.description: A live-action remake of the beloved animated film about a lonely Hawaiian girl who adopts a mischievous alien experiment as her pet dog.

movies.title: Elio
movies.description: An underdog kid who finds himself accidentally beamed up to the Communiverse, an interplanetary organization, where he is mistakenly identified as Earth's ambassador.

movies.title: Fantastic Four: First Steps
movies.description: Marvel's first family — Mr. Fantastic, the Invisible Woman, the Human Torch, and the Thing — take their first steps into the MCU in a retro-futuristic adventure.

movies.title: Freakier Friday
movies.description: Years after their first body swap, Tess and Anna Coleman discover the magical curse has returned — and this time it's affecting a new generation of their family.

movies.title: Tron: Ares
movies.description: A highly sophisticated program named Ares is sent from the digital world into the real world on a dangerous mission, marking a new chapter in the Tron saga.

movies.title: Zootopia 2
movies.description: Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde return for a new adventure in the mammal metropolis of Zootopia, facing fresh challenges that test their partnership.

movies.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movies.description: Jake Sully and his family venture into the volcanic regions of Pandora, encountering the Ash People and facing new threats to their world.

movies.title: Hoppers
movies.description: A Pixar adventure following a group of tiny creatures who must take a giant leap of faith to save their world.

movies.title: The Mandalorian & Grogu
movies.tagline: This is the way... to theaters
movies.description: Din Djarin and Grogu's story continues on the big screen as the unlikely duo faces new galactic threats and forges their bond as father and son.

movies.title: Toy Story 5
movies.description: Woody, Buzz, and the gang face their biggest challenge yet as they navigate a world where toys must compete with the allure of modern technology.

movies.title: Moana (Live-Action)
movies.description: A live-action retelling of the story of Moana, a spirited Polynesian teenager who sets sail on a daring mission to save her people.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
movies.description: Peter Parker swings into a brand new chapter as Spider-Man faces fresh villains and new responsibilities in a changed New York City.

movies.title: Ice Age 6
movies.description: Manny, Sid, Diego, and the rest of the herd return for another prehistoric adventure as they face a new ice age threat.

movies.title: Avengers: Doomsday
movies.description: Earth's mightiest heroes face their most formidable challenge yet when Doctor Doom emerges as a multiversal threat.

movies.title: Star Wars: Starfighter
movies.tagline: Take flight in a galaxy far, far away
movies.description: A new Star Wars story takes to the skies, following elite pilots in thrilling dogfights across the galaxy.

movies.title: Frozen III
movies.description: Anna and Elsa embark on a new journey that will test the bonds of sisterhood and reveal ancient secrets about the magic that connects them.

movies.title: Avengers: Secret Wars
movies.description: The Avengers face the ultimate multiversal collision as heroes from across realities unite to prevent the destruction of everything.

movies.title: Coco 2
movies.description: Miguel's musical journey continues as he discovers new connections between the Land of the Living and the Land of the Dead.

movies.title: Avatar 4
movies.description: The epic saga of Pandora continues as new regions and cultures are revealed, expanding the world James Cameron first imagined.

movies.title: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
movies.tagline: The one that started it all
movies.description: A beautiful princess, cast out by her jealous stepmother the Evil Queen, finds refuge with seven lovable dwarfs in the forest.

movies.title: Pinocchio
movies.tagline: When you wish upon a star
movies.description: A wooden puppet created by the woodcarver Geppetto is brought to life by a fairy and must prove himself brave, truthful, and unselfish to become a real boy.

movies.title: Fantasia
movies.description: Disney's groundbreaking animated masterpiece brings classical music to life through a series of stunning animated sequences, including Mickey Mouse as the Sorcerer's Apprentice.

movies.title: Dumbo
movies.tagline: The most extraordinary elephant in the world
movies.description: A baby circus elephant with oversized ears is ridiculed by everyone, until he discovers that his enormous ears allow him to fly.

movies.title: Bambi
movies.description: A young deer prince grows up in the forest, learning life's lessons about friendship, love, and loss alongside his friends Thumper and Flower.

movies.title: Saludos Amigos
movies.tagline: A musical journey through Latin America
movies.description: Disney artists travel through South America, inspiring four animated segments featuring Donald Duck and a new friend, the Brazilian parrot Jose Carioca.

movies.title: The Three Caballeros
movies.description: Donald Duck receives birthday gifts from his friends Jose Carioca and Panchito, leading to a wild musical adventure through Latin America.

movies.title: Make Mine Music
movies.description: A collection of animated musical segments set to popular music of the era, ranging from comedy to drama.

movies.title: Fun and Fancy Free
movies.description: Two animated tales — Bongo the circus bear and Mickey and the Beanstalk — are presented by Jiminy Cricket and ventriloquist Edgar Bergen.

movies.title: Melody Time
movies.description: Seven animated segments set to popular music and folk tales, including the stories of Johnny Appleseed and Pecos Bill.

movies.title: The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad
movies.description: Two classic tales brought to life: Kenneth Grahame's Mr. Toad of Toad Hall and Washington Irving's Legend of Sleepy Hollow.

movies.title: Cinderella
movies.tagline: A dream is a wish your heart makes
movies.description: After her father's death, a kind young woman is forced into servitude by her wicked stepmother, but a magical fairy godmother helps her attend the royal ball.

movies.title: Alice in Wonderland
movies.description: A curious young girl falls down a rabbit hole into the fantastical world of Wonderland, encountering bizarre characters like the Mad Hatter and Cheshire Cat.

movies.title: Peter Pan
movies.tagline: All it takes is faith, trust, and pixie dust
movies.description: The Darling children are whisked away to the magical island of Neverland by the eternally young Peter Pan, where they face the villainous Captain Hook.

movies.title: Lady and the Tramp
movies.tagline: A love story for the ages
movies.description: A refined cocker spaniel and a streetwise mutt fall in love over a plate of spaghetti in this timeless Disney romance.

movies.title: Sleeping Beauty
movies.description: A princess cursed by the evil fairy Maleficent to die on her sixteenth birthday is hidden away by three good fairies, but destiny cannot be escaped.

movies.title: One Hundred and One Dalmatians
movies.description: When the villainous Cruella de Vil dognaps all the Dalmatian puppies in London, their parents Pongo and Perdita set out on a daring rescue mission.

movies.title: The Sword in the Stone
movies.description: A young orphan named Wart is tutored by the wizard Merlin, who prepares him for an unexpected destiny as the future King Arthur.

movies.title: The Jungle Book
movies.description: Mowgli, a boy raised by wolves in the Indian jungle, embarks on a journey to the human village with the help of Baloo the bear and Bagheera the panther.

movies.title: The Aristocats
movies.tagline: Everybody wants to be a cat
movies.description: When a butler learns that a wealthy madame's fortune will go to her cats, he kidnaps them, and a streetwise alley cat must help them find their way home.

movies.title: Robin Hood
movies.description: The legendary tale of Robin Hood is retold with animal characters, as a fox outlaw robs from the greedy Prince John to give to the poor.

movies.title: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh
movies.description: The lovable bear Winnie the Pooh and his friends in the Hundred Acre Wood embark on a series of gentle adventures filled with honey and friendship.

movies.title: The Rescuers
movies.description: Two brave mice from the Rescue Aid Society set out to save a kidnapped orphan girl from the clutches of the evil Madame Medusa.

movies.title: The Fox and the Hound
movies.description: A young fox and a hound puppy become the best of friends, but as they grow up, the forces of nature and society threaten to tear them apart.

movies.title: The Black Cauldron
movies.tagline: A quest for the enchanted cauldron
movies.description: A young pig keeper named Taran must find and destroy the powerful Black Cauldron before the Horned King uses it to raise an army of the undead.

movies.title: The Great Mouse Detective
movies.description: In Victorian London, mouse detective Basil of Baker Street must outwit the criminal mastermind Ratigan to rescue a kidnapped toymaker.

movies.title: Oliver & Company
movies.description: A homeless kitten named Oliver joins a gang of dogs led by the streetwise Dodger in the bustling streets of New York City.

movies.title: The Little Mermaid
movies.description: A spirited young mermaid princess makes a deal with a sea witch to trade her voice for human legs so she can discover the world above the ocean.

movies.title: The Rescuers Down Under
movies.description: Bernard and Miss Bianca travel to the Australian outback to rescue a boy and a rare golden eagle from a poacher.

movies.title: Beauty and the Beast
movies.description: A young woman is imprisoned by a fearsome Beast in his enchanted castle, but she gradually learns to see the kind heart hiding beneath his monstrous exterior.

movies.title: Aladdin
movies.description: A charming street urchin discovers a magic lamp containing a wise-cracking genie and uses his three wishes to win the heart of Princess Jasmine.

movies.title: The Lion King
movies.description: A young lion prince must overcome tragedy and exile to reclaim his rightful place as king of the Pride Lands from his treacherous uncle Scar.

movies.title: Pocahontas
movies.description: A free-spirited Native American woman forges an unlikely bond with English settler John Smith, bridging two worlds on the brink of conflict.

movies.title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
movies.description: Quasimodo, the bell-ringer of Notre Dame, defies his cruel guardian Frollo and ventures into the streets of Paris to help a kind-hearted Romani woman.

movies.title: Hercules
movies.description: The son of Zeus must prove himself a true hero on Earth to reclaim his place among the gods on Mount Olympus, battling the scheming Hades along the way.

movies.title: Mulan
movies.tagline: The flower that blooms in adversity
movies.description: A young Chinese woman disguises herself as a male warrior to take her aging father's place in the army and save China from the invading Huns.

movies.title: Tarzan
movies.description: A man raised by gorillas in the African jungle must decide where he truly belongs when he discovers other humans for the first time.

movies.title: Fantasia 2000
movies.description: A continuation of the original Fantasia, blending classical music with stunning new animated sequences including a returning Sorcerer's Apprentice.

movies.title: Dinosaur
movies.tagline: You've never seen anything like this
movies.description: An iguanodon raised by lemurs must lead his herd to a safe nesting ground after a devastating meteor shower destroys their home.

movies.title: The Emperor's New Groove
movies.description: A selfish young emperor is transformed into a llama by his scheming advisor and must rely on a kind peasant to help him reclaim his throne.

movies.title: Atlantis: The Lost Empire
movies.description: A young linguist joins an expedition to find the lost city of Atlantis, uncovering a living civilization and a plot to exploit its powerful energy source.

movies.title: Lilo & Stitch
movies.description: A lonely Hawaiian girl adopts what she thinks is a dog but is actually a destructive alien experiment, and together they learn the true meaning of family.

movies.title: Treasure Planet
movies.description: A rebellious teenager embarks on an intergalactic voyage aboard a solar-powered ship to find the legendary treasure of Captain Flint.

movies.title: Brother Bear
movies.description: A young Inuit hunter is magically transformed into a bear and must journey with a bear cub to the place where the lights touch the earth to change back.

movies.title: Home on the Range
movies.description: Three dairy cows set out to capture a cattle rustler to save their farm from foreclosure in the Wild West.

movies.title: Chicken Little
movies.description: After causing a town-wide panic by claiming the sky is falling, a small chicken must prove himself when an actual alien invasion threatens his town.

movies.title: Meet the Robinsons
movies.description: A brilliant young inventor is taken to the future by a mysterious boy, where he meets an eccentric family and must fix a time machine to save the future.

movies.title: Bolt
movies.description: A dog who stars in a TV show believes his superpowers are real and embarks on a cross-country journey to save his owner from danger.

movies.title: The Princess and the Frog
movies.description: A hardworking waitress in 1920s New Orleans is transformed into a frog after kissing a prince who has been cursed by a voodoo sorcerer.

movies.title: Tangled
movies.tagline: They're taking adventure to new lengths
movies.description: A long-haired princess trapped in a tower teams up with a charming bandit to escape and discover the truth about her royal heritage.

movies.title: Winnie the Pooh
movies.tagline: Return to the Hundred Acre Wood
movies.description: Pooh and his friends set off on a grand adventure to rescue Christopher Robin, who they believe has been captured by a creature called the Backson.

movies.title: Wreck-It Ralph
movies.description: A video game villain who dreams of being a hero ventures into other games to prove he can be the good guy.

movies.title: Frozen
movies.description: When Queen Elsa's icy powers accidentally plunge the kingdom into eternal winter, her fearless sister Anna embarks on a journey to save both Elsa and their home.

movies.title: Big Hero 6
movies.description: A robotics prodigy and his inflatable healthcare robot Baymax form a team of high-tech heroes to combat a masked villain threatening San Fransokyo.

movies.title: Zootopia
movies.description: In a city of anthropomorphic animals, a rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a conspiracy.

movies.title: Moana
movies.description: An adventurous Polynesian teenager sets sail across the Pacific to save her people, teaming up with the demigod Maui to restore the stolen heart of Te Fiti.

movies.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
movies.description: Ralph and Vanellope venture into the expansive world of the internet to find a replacement part for Vanellope's game, discovering new worlds and testing their friendship.

movies.title: Frozen II
movies.description: Elsa hears a mysterious calling from the enchanted forests beyond Arendelle and journeys north with Anna, Kristoff, Olaf, and Sven to discover the origin of her powers.

movies.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
movies.tagline: A quest to save her world
movies.description: A lone warrior must track down the legendary last dragon to restore the fractured land of Kumandra and unite its divided people.

movies.title: Encanto
movies.description: In a magical Colombian family where everyone has been blessed with a unique gift, young Mirabel discovers she may be the only one who can save their enchanted home.

movies.title: Strange World
movies.description: The legendary Clades are a family of explorers who must navigate an uncharted, treacherous land beneath the surface of their world.

movies.title: Wish
movies.tagline: Be careful what you wish for
movies.description: In the magical kingdom of Rosas, a sharp-witted idealist named Asha makes a wish so powerful it is answered by a cosmic force — a tiny ball of boundless energy called Star.

movies.title: Moana 2
movies.description: Moana receives an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors and must journey to the far seas of Oceania, reuniting with Maui for an all-new adventure.

movies.title: Toy Story
movies.description: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened when a new spaceman action figure arrives to compete for the affections of their owner, a boy named Andy.

movies.title: A Bug's Life
movies.description: A misfit ant recruits a troupe of circus bugs to help defend his colony from a gang of greedy grasshoppers.

movies.title: Toy Story 2
movies.tagline: The toys are back in town
movies.description: When Woody is stolen by a toy collector, Buzz Lightyear and the gang set out on a rescue mission, while Woody discovers his origins as a valuable collectible.

movies.title: Monsters, Inc.
movies.description: Two monsters who work at a scare factory discover that a human child has accidentally entered their world and must return her home before it's too late.

movies.title: Finding Nemo
movies.description: An overprotective clownfish father embarks on a treacherous ocean journey to find his son Nemo, who has been captured by a diver and placed in a dentist's fish tank.

movies.title: The Incredibles
movies.description: A family of undercover superheroes is forced out of retirement to save the world from a vengeful former fan-turned-villain and his killer robot.

movies.title: Cars
movies.tagline: Ahhh... it's got that new movie smell
movies.description: A hotshot race car gets stranded in a small desert town on Route 66 and learns that life is about the journey, not the finish line.

movies.title: Ratatouille
movies.description: A rat with a passion for cooking makes an unlikely alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant to prove that anyone can cook.

movies.title: WALL·E
movies.tagline: After 700 years of doing what he was built for, he discovered what he was meant for
movies.description: A lonely little robot left to clean up a deserted, trash-covered Earth falls in love with a sleek probe sent to search for signs of plant life.

movies.title: Up
movies.description: A 78-year-old retired balloon salesman ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America, accidentally bringing along an eager young Wilderness Explorer.

movies.title: Toy Story 3
movies.description: When Andy prepares to leave for college, Woody, Buzz, and the rest of the toys are accidentally donated to a daycare center run by a deceptively welcoming bear.

movies.title: Cars 2
movies.description: Mater gets caught up in international espionage while accompanying Lightning McQueen to the World Grand Prix, becoming an unlikely spy.

movies.title: Brave
movies.description: A Scottish princess defies an age-old custom and inadvertently brings chaos to her kingdom by turning her mother into a bear with a witch's spell.

movies.title: Monsters University
movies.description: A prequel revealing how Mike and Sulley first met at college, where they started as rivals before becoming the best of friends.

movies.title: Inside Out
movies.tagline: Meet the little voices inside your head
movies.description: When 11-year-old Riley moves to a new city, the emotions inside her head — Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear, and Disgust — struggle to adjust to her new life.

movies.title: The Good Dinosaur
movies.description: In a world where dinosaurs never went extinct, a timid young Apatosaurus befriends a feral cave boy and embarks on an epic journey home.

movies.title: Finding Dory
movies.tagline: An unforgettable journey she probably won't remember
movies.description: The forgetful blue tang fish Dory sets off on a journey to find her long-lost parents, with help from Marlin and Nemo.

movies.title: Cars 3
movies.tagline: From this moment, everything will change
movies.description: Lightning McQueen faces a new generation of blazing-fast racers and must find a way to compete — or be pushed out of the sport he loves.

movies.title: Coco
movies.description: A 12-year-old aspiring musician is transported to the stunning Land of the Dead, where he seeks the help of his late great-great-grandfather to return him to his family.

movies.title: Incredibles 2
movies.description: Elastigirl is called on to lead a campaign to bring Supers back, while Mr. Incredible navigates the day-to-day heroics of parenting.

movies.title: Toy Story 4
movies.tagline: On the road of life, there are old friends, new friends, and stories that change you
movies.description: Woody and the gang go on a road trip with Bonnie's new craft toy Forky, leading Woody to an unexpected reunion with an old friend.

movies.title: Onward
movies.description: Two teenage elf brothers embark on a magical quest to spend one more day with their late father, using a spell that only half works.

movies.title: Soul
movies.description: A middle-school music teacher gets the chance of a lifetime to play at the best jazz club in town, but an accident sends his soul to the Great Before.

movies.title: Luca
movies.description: A young sea monster who lives in the Italian Riviera disguises himself as human and experiences an unforgettable summer of gelato, pasta, and friendship.

movies.title: Turning Red
movies.description: A confident 13-year-old discovers that whenever she gets too excited or stressed, she transforms into a giant red panda — a magical family trait.

movies.title: Lightyear
movies.description: The sci-fi action movie that inspired the Buzz Lightyear toy follows the legendary Space Ranger as he tries to find a way home from a hostile planet.

movies.title: Elemental
movies.description: In a city where fire, water, earth, and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy discover they have more in common despite their differences.

movies.title: Inside Out 2
movies.description: Now a teenager, Riley faces new emotions like Anxiety, Envy, Ennui, and Embarrassment as she navigates the complexities of growing up and starting high school.

movies.title: Iron Man
movies.description: Billionaire genius Tony Stark builds a high-tech suit of armor after being captured by terrorists and becomes the superhero Iron Man.

movies.title: The Incredible Hulk
movies.tagline: You'll like him when he's angry
movies.description: Scientist Bruce Banner desperately searches for a cure to the gamma radiation that causes him to transform into the Hulk while being pursued by the military.

movies.title: Iron Man 2
movies.tagline: It's not the armor that makes the hero
movies.description: Tony Stark faces pressure from the government, the media, and a vengeful Russian physicist while dealing with the declining health effects of his arc reactor.

movies.title: Thor
movies.description: The powerful god of thunder is cast out of Asgard to Earth, where he must prove himself worthy to reclaim his hammer and his place as heir to the throne.

movies.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
movies.description: A scrawny young man is transformed into the super-soldier Captain America and must battle the Red Skull and HYDRA during World War II.

movies.title: The Avengers
movies.description: Earth's mightiest heroes must assemble for the first time to stop Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

movies.title: Iron Man 3
movies.tagline: Unleash the power behind the armor
movies.description: Tony Stark faces a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin and must rely on his ingenuity rather than his suits to protect those he loves.

movies.title: Thor: The Dark World
movies.description: Thor must save the Nine Realms from the Dark Elves, led by the vengeful Malekith, who seeks to plunge the universe into eternal darkness.

movies.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
movies.description: Captain America teams with Black Widow and Falcon to expose a vast conspiracy within S.H.I.E.L.D. while facing a mysterious assassin known as the Winter Soldier.

movies.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
movies.description: A ragtag group of intergalactic misfits — including a human outlaw, a tree creature, and a talking raccoon — band together to stop a fanatical warrior.

movies.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
movies.description: The Avengers must stop Ultron, a sentient AI created by Tony Stark that determines humanity itself is the greatest threat to Earth.

movies.title: Ant-Man
movies.description: A master thief is recruited by a scientist to wear a suit that allows him to shrink in size and increase in strength to pull off a heist that will save the world.

movies.title: Captain America: Civil War
movies.description: A political rift between Captain America and Iron Man over government oversight of the Avengers tears the team apart.

movies.title: Doctor Strange
movies.description: A brilliant neurosurgeon discovers the hidden world of mysticism and alternate dimensions after a career-ending car accident.

movies.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
movies.description: The Guardians travel the cosmos while helping Peter Quill learn the truth about his mysterious parentage and the celestial being who claims to be his father.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
movies.description: Peter Parker tries to balance high school life with being Spider-Man while facing a new menace — the Vulture — who threatens everything he holds dear.

movies.title: Thor: Ragnarok
movies.description: Thor is imprisoned on the planet Sakaar and must race against time to prevent the all-powerful Hela from destroying Asgard and its civilization.

movies.title: Black Panther
movies.description: T'Challa returns home to the hidden, technologically advanced African nation of Wakanda to take his rightful place as king and face a powerful enemy.

movies.title: Avengers: Infinity War
movies.tagline: An entire universe. Once and for all
movies.description: The Avengers and their allies must sacrifice everything to stop the all-powerful Thanos from collecting all six Infinity Stones and wiping out half of all life.

movies.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp
movies.description: Ant-Man and the Wasp team up on an urgent mission to uncover secrets from the past and rescue Janet van Dyne from the mysterious Quantum Realm.

movies.title: Captain Marvel
movies.description: A former Air Force pilot discovers she has alien superpowers and becomes one of the universe's most powerful heroes during a galactic war between two alien races.

movies.title: Avengers: Endgame
movies.description: After the devastating events of the Snap, the remaining Avengers attempt a desperate time heist to undo Thanos's destruction and restore the universe.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
movies.description: Peter Parker's European vacation is interrupted when Nick Fury recruits him to battle the Elementals alongside the mysterious Mysterio.

movies.title: Black Widow
movies.description: Natasha Romanoff confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a conspiracy tied to her past arises, forcing her to reconnect with her surrogate family.

movies.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
movies.description: A martial arts master must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

movies.title: Eternals
movies.description: An immortal alien race secretly living on Earth for thousands of years must reunite to protect humanity from their evil counterparts, the Deviants.

movies.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
movies.description: When a spell goes wrong, Peter Parker's identity is revealed and dangerous villains from other universes start appearing, threatening everything he holds dear.

movies.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
movies.tagline: Enter a new dimension of Strange
movies.description: Doctor Strange ventures into the Multiverse to protect a teenager with the power to travel between dimensions from a surprisingly dangerous threat.

movies.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
movies.description: Thor enlists the help of Valkyrie, Korg, and his ex-girlfriend Jane Foster — who now wields Mjolnir — to stop the god butcher Gorr from eliminating all gods.

movies.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
movies.description: The people of Wakanda fight to protect their nation from intervening world powers as they mourn the death of King T'Challa and face a new underwater kingdom.

movies.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
movies.tagline: Witness the beginning of a new dynasty
movies.description: The Ant-Man family is accidentally pulled into the Quantum Realm, where they face Kang the Conqueror and must find a way to escape.

movies.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
movies.description: The Guardians embark on a mission to protect Rocket from his creator, the High Evolutionary, while uncovering the secrets of Rocket's tragic past.

movies.title: The Marvels
movies.description: Captain Marvel, Ms. Marvel, and Monica Rambeau must team up when their powers become entangled, swapping places each time they use their abilities.

movies.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
movies.description: Deadpool is offered a place in the Marvel Cinematic Universe by the TVA but instead recruits a variant of Wolverine to save his universe from extinction.

movies.title: Star Wars: A New Hope
movies.tagline: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away
movies.description: A farm boy from a desert planet joins forces with a rogue pilot, a princess, and an old Jedi Knight to rescue the galaxy from the Empire's planet-destroying weapon.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
movies.description: While the rebels regroup on an ice planet, Luke Skywalker begins Jedi training with Yoda as Darth Vader relentlessly pursues the heroes across the galaxy.

movies.title: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi
movies.description: Luke Skywalker leads a mission to rescue Han Solo, then confronts Darth Vader and the Emperor in a final battle for the fate of the galaxy.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace
movies.description: Two Jedi Knights discover a young slave boy with extraordinary Force abilities while protecting a queen from a trade blockade and a mysterious Sith Lord.

movies.title: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones
movies.tagline: A Jedi shall not know anger, nor hatred, nor love
movies.description: Anakin Skywalker falls in love with Senator Padme Amidala while Obi-Wan Kenobi discovers a secret clone army being built for the Republic.

movies.title: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith
movies.description: Anakin Skywalker is seduced by the dark side of the Force, becoming Darth Vader and helping the Emperor destroy the Jedi Order.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars
movies.description: Anakin Skywalker and his new Padawan Ahsoka Tano must rescue Jabba the Hutt's kidnapped son while battling Separatist forces during the Clone Wars.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
movies.description: A new generation of heroes — scavenger Rey, defector Finn, and pilot Poe — join forces with Han Solo and Chewbacca to battle the sinister First Order.

movies.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
movies.description: A band of rebel fighters unite for a daring mission to steal the plans to the Death Star, the Empire's ultimate weapon of destruction.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi
movies.description: Rey seeks Luke Skywalker's help to turn the tide for the Resistance, while the remnants of the rebel fleet face the First Order's relentless pursuit.

movies.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
movies.description: A young Han Solo joins a gang of galactic smugglers, meets his future copilot Chewbacca, and encounters Lando Calrissian years before joining the Rebellion.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
movies.tagline: The saga will end, the story lives forever
movies.description: The surviving members of the Resistance face the First Order once more as Rey confronts her true identity and the return of Emperor Palpatine.

movies.title: 101 Dalmatians
movies.description: A live-action retelling of the classic tale in which the villainous Cruella de Vil dognaps Dalmatian puppies for her latest fur coat.

movies.title: 102 Dalmatians
movies.description: Cruella de Vil returns to her old ways after being released from prison, once again targeting Dalmatian puppies for her fashion obsession.

movies.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
movies.tagline: Prepare to be blown out of the water
movies.description: Blacksmith Will Turner teams up with eccentric pirate Captain Jack Sparrow to rescue the governor's daughter from cursed pirates who become undead in moonlight.

movies.title: Alice in Wonderland
movies.tagline: You're invited to a very important date
movies.description: A 19-year-old Alice returns to Underland and must help the Mad Hatter and the White Queen overthrow the tyrannical Red Queen.

movies.title: Maleficent
movies.description: The untold story of Disney's most iconic villain reveals the events that hardened Maleficent's heart and drove her to curse baby Princess Aurora.

movies.title: Cinderella
movies.description: A live-action retelling of the classic fairy tale, following a young woman who endures cruelty from her stepfamily but keeps her kindness and finds her prince.

movies.title: The Jungle Book
movies.tagline: The legend will never be the same
movies.description: A boy raised by wolves in the Indian jungle must face the fearsome tiger Shere Khan while learning the true meaning of home and belonging.

movies.title: Alice Through the Looking Glass
movies.tagline: It's time for a little madness
movies.description: Alice travels back in time through a magical looking glass to save the Mad Hatter by altering events in Underland's past.

movies.title: Beauty and the Beast
movies.description: A live-action adaptation of Disney's animated classic, following Belle as she becomes a prisoner in a Beast's enchanted castle and learns to look beyond appearances.

movies.title: Christopher Robin
movies.description: A grown-up Christopher Robin, now overwhelmed by adult responsibilities, receives an unexpected visit from his childhood friend Winnie the Pooh.

movies.title: Aladdin
movies.description: A live-action retelling of the classic tale where a kindhearted street urchin and a power-hungry vizier vie for a magic lamp that has the power to grant wishes.

movies.title: Dumbo
movies.description: A live-action reimagining directed by Tim Burton, in which a baby elephant with enormous ears is discovered to be able to fly by a struggling circus family.

movies.title: The Lion King
movies.description: A photorealistic reimagining of Disney's animated classic follows young Simba's journey from exile back to the Pride Lands to challenge his uncle Scar.

movies.title: Maleficent: Mistress of Evil
movies.description: Maleficent and Aurora begin to question their complex family ties as Aurora's upcoming wedding to Prince Phillip ignites a conflict between humans and fairies.

movies.title: Mulan
movies.description: A live-action reimagining of the animated classic, following a young Chinese woman who disguises herself as a man to fight for the Emperor of China.

movies.title: Cruella
movies.description: Set in 1970s London, a young grifter named Estella becomes the raucous, revenge-driven Cruella de Vil after clashing with the legendary Baroness von Hellman.

movies.title: Pinocchio
movies.description: A live-action reimagining of the beloved animated classic, following the wooden puppet Pinocchio on his journey to become a real boy.

movies.title: Peter Pan & Wendy
movies.description: A live-action retelling of J.M. Barrie's classic tale about a girl who refuses to grow up and travels to the magical Neverland with Peter Pan.

movies.title: The Little Mermaid
movies.description: A live-action reimagining of the animated musical classic, following Ariel as she makes a deal with the sea witch Ursula to walk on land and find true love.

movies.title: Mufasa: The Lion King
movies.tagline: The story of an orphan king
movies.description: Rafiki tells the legend of Mufasa to young lion cub Kiara, revealing the orphaned cub's incredible journey from lost and alone to becoming the beloved king.

movies.title: Avatar
movies.description: A paraplegic Marine is dispatched to the moon Pandora, where he becomes torn between following orders and protecting the alien civilization he has come to love.

movies.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
movies.description: Jake Sully and Neytiri's family must flee their home and seek refuge with the reef-dwelling Metkayina clan when an old threat returns to Pandora.

movies.title: Free Guy
movies.tagline: Life's too short to be a background character
movies.description: A bank teller discovers he is actually a background player in a video game and decides to become the hero of his own story.

movies.title: The Menu
movies.tagline: You'll eat what they serve you
movies.description: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the celebrity chef has prepared a lavish menu with shocking surprises.

movies.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
movies.tagline: No one can stop the reign
movies.description: Generations after Caesar's reign, a young ape goes on a journey that will lead him to question everything he's been taught about the past and make choices that will define a future for apes and humans alike.

movies.title: Alien: Romulus
movies.tagline: In space, no one can hear you scream
movies.description: A group of young space colonists scavenging a derelict space station encounter the most terrifying life form in the universe.

movies.title: Night at the Museum
movies.description: A newly hired night security guard at the Museum of Natural History discovers that an ancient curse causes the exhibits to come alive after dark.
